classification_routing.justification: processing_meta.json exposes no explicit route/inferred_type, so route is not directly recoverable; but ocr_job COMPLETED, ocr_quality=low, language=vi, and coherent Vietnamese text pulled from a no-text-layer scan all confirm the vision/OCR path ran (consistent with expected vision_only). Minor deduction only because the route is inferred rather than explicitly logged.

text_coverage.justification: All substantive text is present: both exam variants (Đề 2 and Đề 1), both relational-schema tables, question 1 (create-table prompt) and all six SQL sub-questions a–f for each variant. Untranscribed handwritten red grading marks are noted in the reference as not fully transcribed, so no penalty.

extraction_fidelity.justification: Vietnamese diacritics are largely intact and correct (CƠ SỞ DỮ LIỆU, điều kiện tiên quyết, Đưa ra danh sách), but the Đ diacritic is dropped in the DieuKien key and a Vietnamese decimal comma is anglicized.

structure_preservation.justification: Headings, numbered questions, lettered sub-lists, and both tables are preserved with correct reading order — notably the two-column source layout (questions c–f in the right column) is correctly merged into a single a–f sequence per variant. Deduction because the Đề 1 table gained a spurious empty middle column (3 columns vs the source's 2).
evidence: Đề 1 table header "| Quan hệ | Thuộc tính | Thông tin |" vs source two-column table

faithfulness_no_hallucination.justification: No exam questions or content were invented; every question matches the source. The only fabrication is an attribute 'ThongTin' inserted into the Đề 1 HocPhan schema plus an empty 'Thuộc tính' column not present in the source.
evidence: output "HocPhan(**MaHP**, TenHP, ThongTin, soTC, heSoCKy)" vs source "HocPhan(MaHP, TenHP, soTC, heSoCKy)"

formula_table_code.justification: No formulas or code; the load-bearing structures are the two relational-schema tables. The Đề 2 table is faithful and legible, but the Đề 1 table has an invented empty 'Thuộc tính' column and an added 'ThongTin' attribute, degrading table fidelity.
evidence: Đề 1 table row "| HocPhan(**MaHP**, TenHP, ThongTin, soTC, heSoCKy) |  | ... |" — phantom empty column plus invented ThongTin

classification.actual_route: vision_only (inferred from ocr_job COMPLETED + ocr_quality signal; not explicitly present in processing_meta.json)

hallucinations: ThongTin — invented attribute in the Đề 1 HocPhan schema: output "HocPhan(**MaHP**, TenHP, ThongTin, soTC, heSoCKy)"; source schema has no ThongTin attribute.
Extra empty "Thuộc tính" column in the Đề 1 relation table (header "| Quan hệ | Thuộc tính | Thông tin |"); the source table has only two columns.
normalization_note: The normalized markdown reads coherently and preserves both exam variants end to end with a horizontal-rule separator; no large spans dropped or corrupted. Minor OCR drift only (Đ→D in MaHPĐK, comma→dot in 0,5, straight vs curly quotes) plus the fabricated Đề 1 table column/attribute. Note: summary.json assigns page_range values 1–6 for a 2-page document (section-indexed rather than page-indexed), a metadata quirk, not a defect in output.md.
overall_comment: Strong true-OCR extraction of a genuine no-text-layer Vietnamese scan: near-complete coverage of both Đề 2 and Đề 1, correct vi language detection, clean diacritics, and correct handling of the two-column reading order. The route was not explicitly logged but every supporting signal (ocr_job COMPLETED, ocr_quality=low, coherent VN text) is consistent with vision_only, so routing passes. Main defects are minor: a dropped Đ diacritic (MaHPĐK→MaHPDK), a comma→dot decimal change (0,5→0.5), and one fabricated table column/attribute (ThongTin) in the Đề 1 schema.
